summary: Create comprehensive test infrastructure for all repository tests including internal/testutil package with testcontainers for PostgreSQL, Redis, and mock S3 storage, plus Makefile targets and bootstrapping scripts

user_stories.i_want: run full test suite without manually setting up infrastructure
user_stories.so_that: I can quickly verify code changes work correctly
acceptance_criteria: Running 'make test-all' automatically starts required dependencies
All tests pass with containerized dependencies
No manual PostgreSQL or Redis setup required
Tests clean up resources after completion

user_stories.i_want: write integration tests using reusable test utilities
user_stories.so_that: I don't duplicate test setup code across services
acceptance_criteria: internal/testutil package provides database setup helpers
internal/testutil package provides Redis setup helpers
internal/testutil package provides mock S3 storage helpers
All helpers use testcontainers for isolation

user_stories.i_want: quick bootstrap script for test environment
user_stories.so_that: I can start testing immediately after cloning the repository
acceptance_criteria: scripts/test-env.sh provides clear error messages for missing dependencies

user_stories.so_that: I can understand how to verify my changes
acceptance_criteria: CONTRIBUTING.md explains all Makefile test targets
CONTRIBUTING.md includes examples for each service

user_stories.i_want: run integration tests separately from unit tests
user_stories.so_that: CI pipeline provides fast feedback and comprehensive coverage
acceptance_criteria: make test-integration runs only integration tests
Integration tests are tagged with build tag
Unit tests can run without external dependencies

functional_requirements.title: Test Utilities Package
functional_requirements.description: Create internal/testutil package with reusable test helpers using testcontainers-go for PostgreSQL, Redis, and S3/MinIO mock storage

functional_requirements.title: Database Test Helpers
functional_requirements.description: Provide SetupPostgreSQL, TeardownPostgreSQL, RunMigrations, TruncateTables functions for database tests with automatic schema cleanup

functional_requirements.title: Redis Test Helpers
functional_requirements.description: Provide SetupRedis, TeardownRedis, FlushAll functions for Redis-dependent tests with automatic data isolation

functional_requirements.title: S3 Mock Storage
functional_requirements.description: Provide SetupMockS3, CreateBucket, PutTestObject, GetTestObject functions using localstack or minio container for storage-service tests

functional_requirements.title: Makefile Test Targets
functional_requirements.description: Add test-db, test-all, test-integration, test-unit, test-coverage targets to root Makefile with proper dependency management

functional_requirements.title: Test Environment Bootstrap Script
functional_requirements.description: Create scripts/test-env.sh that checks Docker, installs testcontainers dependencies, and validates environment setup

functional_requirements.title: Test Documentation
functional_requirements.description: Update CONTRIBUTING.md with comprehensive testing section including prerequisites, commands, and troubleshooting

functional_requirements.title: JWT Test Helpers
functional_requirements.description: Provide GenerateTestJWT, GenerateExpiredJWT functions for auth testing in auth-service and middleware tests

functional_requirements.title: HTTP Test Server
functional_requirements.description: Provide SetupTestServer helper that creates httptest.Server with configured middleware for endpoint testing

functional_requirements.title: Secure Print Release Service
functional_requirements.description: Queue-based print release with PIN, card, or biometric authentication at the device; supports job hold-and-release for security
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Addresses top enterprise security requirement, prevents data leakage from uncollected documents

functional_requirements.title: Print Quota & Cost Management
functional_requirements.description: User/group-based quotas, departmental cost allocation, configurable chargeback models, budget alerts and enforcement
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Essential for education and enterprise cost control, currently missing from core offering

functional_requirements.title: Analytics & Reporting Service
functional_requirements.description: Usage dashboards, cost analysis, trend reports, environmental impact (paper/energy), exportable reports (PDF/CSV), scheduled reports
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Key decision-making tool for IT management, demonstrates ROI

functional_requirements.title: Print Policy Engine
functional_requirements.description: Rules-based routing (color/mono, duplex, paper size), user/group/document-based policies, time-based restrictions, watermarks

functional_requirements.title: MFA/Smart Card Authentication
functional_requirements.description: Hardware token support, smart card integration, TOTP, biometric authentication options for print release
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Builds on existing auth-service, meets enterprise security standards

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Unit tests must complete within 30 seconds, integration tests within 2 minutes
Testcontainers startup time optimized with reusable containers
non_functional_requirements.metric: container reuse enabled for local development

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Test credentials must not overlap with production credentials
Test containers must be isolated from development/production infrastructure
Tests must run in parallel without conflicts
Test utilities must be documented with examples
non_functional_requirements.metric: godoc comments on all exported functions

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Tests must clean up resources even on failure

risks.risk: Testcontainers requires Docker daemon running, causing CI failures if Docker unavailable
risks.mitigation: Add Docker check in test-env.sh, provide fallback to mock implementations for CI without Docker

risks.risk: Port conflicts when running tests alongside local development services
risks.mitigation: Testcontainers uses random port assignment, update connection strings dynamically

risks.risk: Database migration files may not exist for test schema
risks.mitigation: Create migrations directory under internal/testutil with test-specific migrations

risks.risk: Flaky tests due to container startup timing
risks.mitigation: Add readiness checks with exponential backoff in Setup* functions

risks.risk: Resource leaks from tests that don't clean up containers
risks.mitigation: Use t.Cleanup() in all helpers, add goroutine leak detection in CI

implementation_phases.name: Test Utilities Foundation
tasks: Create internal/testutil package structure
Implement SetupPostgreSQL and TeardownPostgreSQL with testcontainers
Implement SetupRedis and TeardownRedis with testcontainers
Add base test configuration and constants

implementation_phases.name: S3 Mock and JWT Helpers
tasks: Implement SetupMockS3 with localstack/minio container
Implement GenerateTestJWT and GenerateExpiredJWT helpers
Implement HTTP test server helper
Add unit tests for testutil package

implementation_phases.name: Makefile Integration
tasks: Add test-db target to start PostgreSQL and Redis containers
Add test-all target to run all tests with dependency checks
Add test-integration target with build tag filtering
Add test-unit and test-coverage targets

implementation_phases.name: Bootstrap and Documentation
tasks: Create scripts/test-env.sh with dependency checks
Add test setup section to CONTRIBUTING.md
Document each test target with examples
Add troubleshooting section for common issues

implementation_phases.name: Service Test Migration
tasks: Update auth-service tests to use testutil
Update job-service tests to use testutil
Update storage-service tests to use testutil
Update registry-service and notification-service tests
Verify all tests pass with make test-all

key_gaps: Secure print release with user authentication at device (PIN/card/biometric) to prevent sensitive documents from being left unattended
Print quota management and departmental cost allocation/chargeback for expense tracking and budget control
Comprehensive reporting and analytics including usage trends, cost analysis, and environmental impact
Mobile printing applications for iOS and Android with native printing capabilities
Print policy engine with rules-based routing (color/mono, duplex, paper selection) based on user/department/document
unique_selling_points: Open-source architecture enabling vendor neutrality unlike competitors tied to specific hardware
Microservices design allows independent scaling and deployment flexibility
Modern Go-based infrastructure with container-first design
Extensible through internal packages for custom integrations
Self-hosted option for data sovereignty requirements
Lower total cost of ownership vs proprietary solutions
API-first design enables custom workflow integrations
